Name: LU 109 - Zoning, 1166 Bedford Avenue Rezoning, Brooklyn (N 260163 ZRK).
Title: Application number N 260163 ZRK (1166 Bedford Avenue Rezoning) submitted by Khalifah Residences LLC, pursuant to Section 201 of the New York City Charter, for an amendment of the Zoning Resolution of the City of New York, amending APPENDIX F for the purpose of establishing a Mandatory Inclusionary Housing Area, Borough of Brooklyn, Community District 3, Council District 36.

History.Description: This Resolution was Approved by Committee
